description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable Docker image with a docker:dind service and defines a single stage named docker. Add a job called build base docker image in the docker stage that runs the exact commands: docker build -t btimperman/pipelinecli ., docker login -u btimperman -p $DOCKER_PASSWORD, and docker push btimperman/pipelinecli. The pipeline builds the image and pushes it to Docker Hub.
